title: Plumbing, Heating, and Air-Conditioning Contractors

sources.title: 2022 NAICS definition and index entries for 238220
sources.what_it_supports: Industry classification context only; it is not used as target-specific financial, operating, transaction, or demand evidence.

narrative.executive_view: This packet concerns only the frozen HVAC-focused contractor archetype in the stated EBITDA band. Target-specific evidence needed for the screen was not supplied, so no economic conclusion is authored here.
narrative.revenue_and_pass_through: No selected-archetype accrual revenue record or documentation of eligible third-party pass-through consideration was available. Equipment, materials, and operator-controlled delivery are not deducted without the specified documentation.
narrative.technical_value: The frozen source-free role taxonomy is retained exactly as an assumption. No target payroll, contractor ledger, or removable-cash-cost reconciliation was available to establish a controllable-value-added opportunity.
narrative.implementation: No target system logs, workflow evidence, vendor invoices, or documented before-and-after cases were supplied. Operational realization and implementation investment therefore remain missing rather than being inferred from general technology adoption.
narrative.commercial_capture: No target maintenance agreements, bid histories, renewal cohorts, price books, or matched gross-price histories were supplied. Commercial retention remains separate from operational realization and is left missing.
narrative.buyability: No closed deal-flow, ownership, process-access, financing, diligence, or onboarding evidence was supplied for the frozen reference buyer. Sale availability, access and win, and both capacities are consequently missing and distinct.
narrative.entry_and_exit: No state-matched entry transaction evidence or closed comparable-multiple support was supplied. The normalized year-five state and the downside multiple construct remain missing, with no implied multiple expansion.
narrative.operator_survival: No longitudinal, constant-price operator-controlled service-demand evidence was supplied. A fixed-base CVA basket cannot be reconciled without the same recognized-revenue and pass-through primitives, so the basket is missing.
narrative.risks_and_uncertainty: Archetype selection uncertainty is frozen by the overlapping count ranges, and the value basis is expressly source-free. Missing target-specific primitives and assumption-only cash-cost/removability judgments must remain visible rather than converted into neutral estimates.

scenario_narratives.low: No coherent downside scenario can be constructed because the target-specific revenue, operating, commercial, buyability, valuation, and survival primitives are missing.
scenario_narratives.base: No coherent base scenario is constructed. The packet preserves missing target-specific primitives and the frozen source-free value-basis assumption without converting either into an economic result.
scenario_narratives.high: No coherent upside scenario can be constructed because the required source-backed endpoints, capacity evidence, state-matched valuation evidence, and fixed-base demand evidence are absent.

recognized_revenue.rationale: No selected-archetype accrual recognized-revenue evidence was supplied.
caveats: No revenue denominator is inferred from the normalized dataset or industry classification.

evidence.rationale: No revenue presentation or target pass-through documentation was supplied.
caveats: No pass-through item is deducted without documentation.

employee_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Annual cash cost measured against controllable value-added revenue when a target reconciliation is available.

amount.rationale: Bounded source-free placeholder required by the frozen assumption value basis; it is not observed payroll or a target-specific amount.
caveats: A target payroll and cash-burden reconciliation is required before using this amount.

controllable_contractor_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Annual controllable contractor cash cost measured against controllable value-added revenue when a target reconciliation is available.

amount.rationale: Bounded source-free placeholder required by the frozen assumption value basis; it is not a documented subcontractor ledger amount.
caveats: Documented third-party pass-through may not overlap this controllable contractor cash-cost category.

removable_fraction.rationale: Source-free bounded removability judgment for the frozen role taxonomy.
caveats: Requires target workflow and cash-cost evidence.

cross_checks.target_identity_preserved: The packet addresses only the frozen HVAC-focused contractor archetype.
cross_checks.pass_through_removed_once: No pass-through items are authored; the canonical gross-of-all empty partition is retained.
cross_checks.removability_only_in_v: Role removability is a source-free V primitive and is not used to infer other factors.
cross_checks.investment_only_in_i: No implementation investment is inferred or embedded in commercial retention.
cross_checks.commercial_only_in_c: No commercial-retention schedule is authored from operational or demand evidence.
cross_checks.buyer_access_separate_from_price: No buyer access or win evidence is authored, and no paid-price channel is embedded in it.
cross_checks.p_uses_frozen_y5_state: The missing P construct retains the required entry-equivalent state and closed anchor shape without substituting a state.
cross_checks.p_excludes_c_and_survival: The closed P exclusion map explicitly excludes commercial retention and constant-price survival.
cross_checks.survival_is_constant_price_value_added: No survival basket is inferred; the retained closed assertions require constant-price CVA treatment if evidence becomes available.

top_uncertain_inputs.range: Missing; no target-specific accrual revenue, contracts, or ledger documentation was supplied.
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Prevents construction of the controllable-value-added denominator and fixed-base survival basket.

top_uncertain_inputs.range: Missing; no bounded target-specific operating, commercial, sale, access, or capacity evidence was supplied.
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Prevents identification of operational, commercial, and buyability factors.

top_uncertain_inputs.range: Missing; no comparable transactions or longitudinal fixed-base demand data was supplied.
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Prevents construction of valuation resilience and survival inputs.

reviewer_note: Validate source closure, frozen role order and weights, missing-value treatment, closed accounting/capacity/state structures, and the absence of an inferred economic conclusion.
